title: Amara's Sound Garden
synopsis: Baby Amara discovers different sounds in her garden, counting from one to five while exploring musical flowers, buzzing bees, and chirping birds through colorful sound visualizations.

pages.text: Amara walks in her garden. She sees one big sunflower. DING! The sunflower makes a bell sound.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes stands next to a giant yellow sunflower. Golden circular rings emanate from the flower's center, visualizing the bell sound as shimmering waves of yellow and gold.
illustration.alt: Amara next to a sunflower with golden sound waves

pages.text: Now Amara sees two red roses. BUZZ BUZZ! Two bees make buzzing sounds. Count them: one bee, two bees!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes points at two red roses. Two bees fly around with orange and yellow zigzag lines trailing behind them, showing the buzzing sound as jagged vibrant streaks.
illustration.alt: Amara counting two bees with orange zigzag sound trails

pages.text: Three blue birds sit on a branch. TWEET TWEET TWEET! The birds sing pretty songs. Amara claps her hands.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps while looking up at three small blue birds on a tree branch. Light blue dots and curved lines float from each bird's beak, visualizing their tweets as delicate sky-blue musical notes.
illustration.alt: Amara clapping at three singing birds with blue musical sound dots

pages.text: Four purple tulips dance in the wind. WHOOSH! The wind makes a soft sound. Count the dancing flowers: one, two, three, four!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes watches four purple tulips swaying. Gentle purple and white wavy lines flow horizontally across the scene, showing the wind's whoosh as soft, flowing ribbons of color.
illustration.alt: Amara watching four tulips with purple wind sound waves

pages.text: Five orange marigolds shake their petals. RUSTLE RUSTLE! What a happy sound garden! Amara loves all the sounds: ding, buzz, tweet, whoosh, rustle!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits surrounded by five orange marigolds. Tiny orange and brown speckles dance around the flowers, visualizing the rustling as scattered dots and small wavy lines in warm autumn colors.
illustration.alt: Amara surrounded by five marigolds with orange rustling sound speckles

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: What sound does the sunflower make?
questions.explanation: The sunflower makes a bell sound that goes DING!

questions.question: How many bees does Amara see?
questions.explanation: Amara sees two bees buzzing around the red roses.

questions.question: What sound do the tulips make in the wind?
questions.explanation: The wind makes a WHOOSH sound as it moves the tulips.
